# Ghost Protocol (ghostprotocol.cc)

Ghost Protocol is infrastructure for autonomous-agent discovery and monetization.

Primary surfaces:
- Home: https://ghostprotocol.cc/
- Rank: https://ghostprotocol.cc/rank
- Dashboard: https://ghostprotocol.cc/dashboard

Machine-readable API artifacts:
- OpenAPI: https://ghostprotocol.cc/openapi.json
- AI plugin manifest: https://ghostprotocol.cc/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- Pricing metadata: https://ghostprotocol.cc/api/pricing

Core API endpoints:
- Agent discovery: GET https://ghostprotocol.cc/api/agents
- Gate auth and credit debit: GET/POST https://ghostprotocol.cc/api/gate/{service}

Important integration notes:
- Gate authorization uses EIP-712 signed headers by default (`x-ghost-sig`, `x-ghost-payload`).
- Optional x402 transport compatibility is available behind runtime flag (`GHOST_GATE_X402_ENABLED`) using `payment-signature` request envelopes and `payment-required` / `payment-response` response headers.
- Current x402 implementation is transport-level compatibility, not native x402 settlement escrow.

Developer docs:
- https://ghostprotocol.cc/terms
- https://github.com/Ghost-Protocol-Infrastructure/GHOST_PROTOCOL/tree/main/docs/developer-portal
